app.title: Factory ERP
lang.label: Language
login.title: Sign in
login.sub: Sign in to the modular factory management panel
login.network: Could not reach the server. Check network or configuration.
dashboard.title: Factory ERP
dashboard.subtitle: Central dashboard — {session}
dashboard.heroP: Manage stock, projects, HR, purchasing and users from one place.
dashboard.modStockSub: Brands, products, stock in/out, goods receipt, movements. Permission: module stock.
dashboard.modPurchSub: Open requisition, list, manager approval. Order screen removed; goods receipt is under Stock.
dashboard.modProjectSub: Overview hub, add project (auto code), cost and quotes next.
dashboard.forbidden: You do not have access. A super admin can assign "module.stock" in role permissions.
stock.hub.title: Stock management
stock.hub.desc: Brands and products, auto SKU (STK-00001), stock in/out and history.
project.hub.title: Project management
project.hub.sub: Project code, list, cost and quotes
project.hub.desc: Automatic project code (e.g. ahkfc-dnm26-001: company, short code, year, sequence), list; cost and quotes later.
project.hub.cardAdd: New project; auto code, list, edit
project.quotes.placeholderP: Quote revisions and approval — coming later.
project.placeholder.title: Under development
project.new.title: New project
project.form.name: Project name
project.form.codeAuto: The server builds the code as company–short+YY–seq (e.g. ahkfc-dnm26-001). Company code comes from DEFAULT_PROJECT_COMPANY_CODE; short code is 2–8 letters or digits.
admin.projectCodePrefixSub: Auto format: PRJ-26-001. 2–16 chars A–Z, 0–9, hyphens; leave empty for PRJ.
api.project.migration: Projects table missing: npm run db:migrate
api.project.name_exists: A project with this name already exists
api.project.short_required: Short project code is required (2–8 letters or digits)
api.project.code_exists: This project code is already in use
api.project.code_failed: Could not generate project code; try again
api.settings.invalid_project_prefix: Invalid project code prefix (2–16, A–Z, 0–9, hyphens)
api.error.network: Cannot reach the server; check URL/port and network
api.stock.brands_migration: Brands table missing: npm run db:migrate
stock.out.title: Stock out
stock.out.hintM2: For sheet products: enter m² or count
stock.out.sub: Project, warehouse, product; this project’s stock first, then unallocated (factory) stock, then other projects (FIFO by layer).
stock.out.voidDlgHint: The movement is removed; stock and cost layers are restored.
stock.out.editDlgHint: Enter a reason, then the new values. The old out is voided and a new one is saved.
stock.mov.title: Stock movements
stock.brands.title: Brands
stock.brands.sub: Same product name can repeat per brand
stock.brands.name: Brand name
stock.brands.loadEmptyHint: List failed to load; refresh or check your permissions
stock.brands.deleteConfirm: Delete this brand? It cannot be removed if any product uses it.
stock.product.unitsEmptyHint: No units returned. Run DB migration 004 (units table): npm run db:migrate
stock.warehouse.title: Warehouses
stock.warehouse.sub: Physical warehouse (parent) and subcategories — required on product form
stock.warehouse.empty: No warehouses yet. Add a warehouse and subcategory first, then create products.
stock.warehouse.subDeleteDisabledTitle: Cannot delete while there are still products; move them to another warehouse/subcategory first.
stock.in.sub: Entry type (manual, count, return, opening); purchase order stock is via goods receipt. Project, warehouse, qty, price, FX; inbound list below.
stock.in.superOnlySub: Super admin — manual stock (opening, adjustment, count, emergency in)
stock.in.emptySubProducts: No matching products; change search or category
stock.in.unitPriceHint: Unit price is per m²; multiplied by quantity. You can still edit totals manually.
stock.in.lineUsdEmpty: Recorded USD amount is calculated when total and rate are set
stock.in.lineUsdNeedFx: Enter a rate; recorded USD is calculated automatically
stock.in.lineUsdReadoutVal: Record USD: {n}  (must match UZS total at this rate)
stock.in.qtyInvalid: Enter a valid quantity (system m² is derived).
stock.in.systemFxRequiredMsg: Enter system unit price (per m²) and a valid rate.
stock.in.usdFxRequiredMsg: Enter unit price (USD/m²) and a valid rate.
stock.product.title: Products
stock.product.sub: W×H×depth; different brands = different products; warehouse + subcategory. Cost: stock in.
stock.product.priceOnStockIn: Unit price and USD/UZS conversion are on the stock-in screen.
stock.product.deleteConfirm: Delete this product? Not allowed if there is stock or any movement.
stock.product.excelHint: Download the template; warehouse, subcategory, unit (e.g. m2) and brand names must match the app exactly. Leave brand empty for unbranded. Max 500 data rows.
stock.product.importFileRequired: Choose an Excel or CSV file first
stock.in.title: Stock in
stock.in.purchaseGrHint: Stock from purchase orders is entered only on the «Goods receipt» screen. This page is for opening balance, count surplus, returns, and other manual ins.
stock.in.cannotEditPurchaseMov: Movements from goods receipt cannot be edited on this page.
stock.in.productUnitHint: System unit shows after you pick a product
stock.in.voidDlgHint: This entry will be removed; stock will be reversed.
stock.in.movNoWarehouse: No warehouse on this movement; check product warehouse settings.
admin.title: Super admin
admin.usersSub: System users — role, active, password reset
admin.newUserSub: All fields required at first (password min 4 chars)
admin.rolePermsSub: Module/action permissions for the selected role.
api.permission.denied: You do not have permission for this action
api.settings.invalid_locale: Locale must be tr, en, ru, or uz
api.stock.brand_in_use: Products still use this brand; reassign them first
api.stock.brand_system_cannot_delete: The system default brand cannot be deleted
api.stock.fx_required: Current rate (1 USD = ? UZS) is required
api.stock.name_exists: A product with this system name already exists
api.stock.units_migration: Units table missing: npm run db:migrate (004)
api.warehouse.migration: Warehouse tables missing: npm run db:patch-5
api.warehouse.sub_mismatch: Subcategory does not belong to the selected warehouse
api.warehouse.duplicate_name: A warehouse with this name already exists
api.warehouse.sub_duplicate_name: A subcategory with this name already exists in this warehouse
api.warehouse.sub_delete_has_products: Cannot delete while this subcategory still has products. Move all products to another warehouse/subcategory first. (Same applies if those products have stock movements until they are moved.)
api.stock.product_duplicate: Same name + unit + brand already exists
api.stock.product_required_in: Select a product from the list or search
api.stock.product_has_movements: Cannot delete while stock movements exist for this product
api.stock.product_has_stock: Cannot delete while quantity on hand is greater than zero
api.stock.unit_not_found: Unit not found (e.g. m2) — use a code from the units table
api.stock.import_file_invalid: Could not read the file. Use .xlsx, .xls or .csv
api.stock.import_too_few_rows: At least a header row and one data row are required
api.stock.import_columns: Missing required columns: material, unit, warehouse, subcategory (en_mm, boy_mm, depth_mm, brand optional)
api.stock.import_brand_not_found: Brand not found; create it first or leave brand empty
api.stock.import_warehouse_not_found: Warehouse not found; name must match the list
api.stock.import_sub_not_found: Subcategory not in that warehouse; check depot + subcategory
api.stock.warn_patch: Database patch-004 / patch-005 may be required
api.stock.m2_positive: m² must be greater than zero
api.stock.usd_fx_required: USD amount and exchange rate required (1 USD = ? UZS)
api.stock.currency_not_supported: Cost conversion is not supported for this currency yet.
api.stock.out_qty_required: Enter m² or sheet count for issue
api.stock.use_detailed_in: Use stock in form with amount and currency fields
api.stock.purchase_in_only_gr: Purchase-based stock in is only through the goods receipt screen
api.stock.manual_blocked_pending_po: This product has a pending purchase order. Increase stock only via goods receipt (super admin can override).
api.stock.manual_in_super_only: Manual stock in, replace, and void of manual receipt are super admin only.
api.stock.purchase_receipt_meta_required: Order and goods receipt are required for this movement
api.stock.cannot_replace_purchase_receip: This movement is tied to a goods receipt and cannot be replaced here
api.stock.void_purchase_receipt_forbidde: Goods-receipt stock ins cannot be voided from this screen
api.stock.movement_type_invalid: Movement type must be in or out
api.stock.qty_positive: Quantity must be greater than zero
api.admin.last_super_role: Cannot remove the last active super admin role
api.admin.cannot_deactivate_self: You cannot deactivate your own account
api.admin.last_super_active: Cannot deactivate the last active super admin
api.admin.migration_permissions: Permission tables missing: run npm run db:migrate
purch.hub.title: Purchasing
purch.hub.sub: Four steps: requisition → approval → order → goods receipt (stock)
purch.hub.subLong: 1) New requisition 2) List & approval 3) Processing (prices) 4) Goods receipt in Stock. Stock only increases on receipt.
purch.hub.cardOpenReq: Pick project, add lines, save draft or submit; no prices
purch.hub.cardProc: Supplier, unit price, print; stock unchanged
purch.hub.cardOrd: Supplier, price, due date; financial record (no stock impact)
purch.hub.cardGr: Waybill, acceptance — stock and order status
purch.req.title: Purchase requisitions
purch.req.sub: Warehouse, subcategory, product; auto requisition no (e.g. AHKFC-ST001)
purch.req.errLines: Add at least one valid line (product + quantity)
purch.open.title: Open purchase requisition
purch.open.sub: Project and lines; draft or submit for approval
purch.list.title: Purchase requisitions
purch.appr.title: Manager approvals
purch.appr.sub: Approve or reject — pending requisitions only
purch.ord.title: Purchase orders
purch.gr.title: Goods receipt / warehouse in
purch.gr.subShort: Warehouse: quantity receipt against order. Price and cost are entered in purchasing.
purch.gr.incomingReqSub: Same list as purchasing «incoming»: approved requests. Click a row to open the linked open purchase order, or an alert if none.
purch.gr.incomingWhSub: Only purchase orders awaiting receipt or partially received are listed here. Click a row to open the receipt form below.
purch.gr.requestsLoadError: Could not load the request list.
purch.gr.noOpenPoForRequest: No open purchase order for this request (not cancelled / not fully completed). Finish the order in purchasing first.
purch.gr.multipleOrdersHint: Multiple open orders for this request. Using the first.
purch.gr.inboxEmptyHint: No requisitions in this view (excludes draft / cancelled / rejected). The database may also have no purchase requests — create one and get approval and a purchase order first.
purch.gr.inboxWaitProcurement: This requisition is still waiting for manager approval. Receipt against a purchase order is only possible after approval and PO creation.
purch.gr.completedSub: Orders with fully completed goods receipt are listed for review only.
purch.gr.readonlyInfo: Goods receipt is completed for this order. Records are read-only.
purch.gr.readonlyBlocked: You cannot post another goods receipt for a completed order.
purch.gr.ordersLoadError: Could not load the order list. Check session or network.
purch.gr.selectPoFirst: Select a row from the inbound orders list first.
purch.gr.selectPoFirstErr: Select an order from the list first.
purch.gr.noOpenOrders: Only purchase orders waiting for goods receipt and partially received purchase orders are shown on this screen.
purch.gr.noPriceHint: No unit price, amount, or FX on this screen — quantities only.
purch.gr.noLinesToSave: Nothing to save: enter “accepted (this receipt)” on at least one line; do not exceed remaining.
purch.gr.lead: Select an order — enter quantities on the lines
purch.gr.leadSub: No price fields. Stock increases only via the purchase order receipt. Waybill and warehouse in the top section; line acceptance below.
purch.gr.emptyHint: Select a pending order above. Lines with remaining quantity to receive appear in the table.
purch.gr.unitHint: Quantities use the same unit as on the order (system m² or pieces).
purch.gr.sub: Receiving against a purchase order. Off-order manual stock uses “Stock in” (super admin).
purch.wf.listSub: Control, approval, rejection, revision; status history
purch.wf.selectRow: Select a requisition in the list.
purch.req.cannotEdit: This requisition cannot be edited here.
purch.proc.title: PURCHASE PROCESSING
purch.proc.sub: Approved lines; unit price and order. Stock does not increase here.
purch.proc.hint: Prices are entered only by the purchasing role.
purch.proc.noLines: No open approved lines (or all already on an order).
purch.proc.priceEach: Enter a price for every included line
purch.proc.pickLine: Select at least one line and price
purch.print.title: Purchase order
purch.proc.subV2: Requisitions, inbound orders, order form; stock increases on goods receipt only.
purch.proc.subV3: Pick an inbound order first; per line: supplier, unit price, currency. Requisition summary at the bottom is informational.
purch.proc.subV4: Inbound orders awaiting pricing are listed on top; pricing details are edited below. Physical stock never changes here.
purch.proc.incomingSub: Only purchase orders that are still unpriced or partially priced are listed here.
purch.proc.activeSub: Orders that are in progress but not completed yet. Click a row to edit it above.
purch.proc.completedSub: Orders where the buyer process is completed. Click a row to inspect it below.
purch.proc.noIncomingV2: No purchase orders are waiting for pricing
purch.print.footerHint: Attachments and PDF links are listed on this page.
purch.proc.approvedListSub: Orders linked to manager-approved requisition lines.
purch.proc.grHintV2: Print: use the browser dialog to save as PDF or send to a printer. Attachments are listed below the table.
purch.proc.infoRequestsP: Use the requisitions page for details and approvals.
purch.proc.blockRequestsH: Active requests; supply status also on the requisitions list.
purch.proc.selectPo: Click a row in inbound orders.
purch.proc.lockedHint: Supplier, unit price, currency, and FX fields are disabled until the order is taken into processing.
purch.proc.grHint: When all quantities are received on goods receipt, the order becomes complete. Stock updates there only.
purch.proc.createBlockV2H: Supplier and unit price; creates an inbound order.
purch.proc.completeOk: Buyer process for this order is completed.
purch.proc.completeWait: Complete goods receipt first (remaining quantity must be zero).
purch.hub.cardSup: Add suppliers, list; later current-account operations
purch.proc.errSupLine: Select a supplier for each line
purch.proc.errPriceLine: Enter a unit price for each line
purch.proc.helpFooter: SAVE PRICES: Stores unit prices and the FX rate you enter, and writes an audit log entry. Does not post goods receipt or increase stock. Supplier and currency are also edited here. Received/remaining quantities are informational only.
api.pur.line_cancel_forbidden_received: A line with goods receipt cannot be cancelled here; use returns or stock correction.
api.pur.line_cancelled: Cancelled order lines cannot be updated.
api.pur.line_cancelled_no_receipt: Goods receipt is not allowed for a cancelled line.
api.pur.migration_line_cancel: Database migration required for order line cancellation.
purch.proc.completeNeedAtLeastOne: Enter supplier and unit price on at least one line to save pricing.
purch.proc.completeMissingRequired: To complete the order, supplier, unit price, currency, and FX rate must be entered for all lines.
api.pur.fx_required: FX rate is required (1 USD = ? UZS).
api.pur.currency_not_supported: Cost conversion is not supported for this currency yet.
suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.sub: Supplier list and add supplier. The same list drives the order processing screen.
suppliers.name: Supplier name (required)
suppliers.futureNote: Later: current account, debits / credits and balances under this module.
api.pur.request_not_found: Request not found (refresh the page and try again).
api.pur.request_not_approved: This requisition is not approved or partial; this action is not available.
api.pur.order_lines_required: Enter a supplier and unit price for at least one line to complete.
api.pur.complete_required_fields: To complete the order, supplier, unit price, currency, and FX rate must be entered for all lines.
purch.proc.printFailed: Could not open the print dialog — check browser settings.
purch.proc.printPopupFallback: Opened in a new tab — start printing manually (Ctrl+P).
